name: socrtwo/whereyoubin-sf
description: Where Have I Been? — classic clickable world maps plus a modern PWA travel log app.

suggest.ext-gd: Required by the legacy poster/map image generator
suggest.ext-curl: Required by the legacy short-URL backends
suggest.ext-pdo_sqlite: For zero-config SQLite deployments (default for the travel-log app)

scripts.lint: bash -c 'for f in $(find . -name "*.php" -not -path "./TCPDF/*"); do php -l "$f" || exit 1; done'
